provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Military Veterans Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

provisions.chapter: PART II Benefits Relating to Military Veterans
provisions.title: Benefits relating to military veterans

definitions.definition: the Defence Council established under section 22 of the Botswana Defence Force Act (Cap. 21:05)
assigned to it under the Botswana Health Professions Act (Cap. 61:02)

a person who—
( a ) has completed his or her service in the Botswana Defence Force
